title: centaurium quadrifolium subsp. barrelieri
intro: Centaurium quadrifolium subsp. barrelieri, also known as Barrelier's centaury, is a subspecies of the Centaurium quadrifolium plant, a perennial herb belonging to the gentian family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Barrelier's centaury include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal preparations, offering a natural approach to addressing various health concerns.
